# growthbook_experiment_template (Resource)

A GrowthBook experiment template. Templates capture default experiment settings (datasource, metrics, targeting, stats engine) that can be reused when creating new experiments.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `datasource` (String) Datasource ID used for analysis.
- `exposure_query_id` (String) Exposure (experiment assignment) query ID within the datasource.
- `stats_engine` (String) Statistics engine: `bayesian` or `frequentist`.
- `targeting` (Attributes) Default targeting configuration for experiments from this template. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--targeting))
- `template_metadata` (Attributes) Template name and description. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--template_metadata))
- `type` (String) Template type. Currently only `standard` is supported.

### Optional

- `activation_metric` (String) Activation metric ID.
- `description` (String) Experiment description.
- `disable_sticky_bucketing` (Boolean) Disable sticky bucketing for experiments from this template.
- `fallback_attribute` (String) Fallback bucketing attribute used for sticky bucketing.
- `goal_metrics` (List of String) Goal metric IDs.
- `guardrail_metrics` (List of String) Guardrail metric IDs.
- `hash_attribute` (String) Attribute used for variation assignment/bucketing.
- `hypothesis` (String) Experiment hypothesis.
- `project` (String) Project ID this template belongs to.
- `secondary_metrics` (List of String) Secondary metric IDs.
- `segment` (String) Segment ID to restrict analysis to.
- `skip_partial_data` (Boolean) Exclude in-progress conversions from analysis.
- `tags` (List of String) Tags applied to experiments created from this template.

### Read-Only

- `date_created` (String) Creation timestamp (RFC3339).
- `date_updated` (String) Last update timestamp (RFC3339).
- `id` (String) Unique experiment template identifier.
- `owner` (String) User ID of the template owner.
- `owner_email` (String) Email of the owner, when resolvable.

<a id="nestedatt--targeting"></a>
### Nested Schema for `targeting`

Required:

- `condition` (String) MongoDB-style targeting condition (JSON string). Use `{}` for none.
- `coverage` (Number) Fraction of traffic included in the experiment (0-1).

Optional:

- `prerequisites` (Attributes List) Feature prerequisites that must be satisfied. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--targeting--prerequisites))
- `saved_groups` (Attributes List) Saved group targeting clauses. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--targeting--saved_groups))

<a id="nestedatt--targeting--prerequisites"></a>
### Nested Schema for `targeting.prerequisites`

Required:

- `condition` (String) Condition the prerequisite must satisfy (JSON string).
- `id` (String) Prerequisite feature ID.


<a id="nestedatt--targeting--saved_groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `targeting.saved_groups`

Required:

- `ids` (List of String) Saved group IDs.
- `match` (String) Match type: `all`, `any`, or `none`.



<a id="nestedatt--template_metadata"></a>
### Nested Schema for `template_metadata`

Required:

- `name` (String) Template name.

Optional:

- `description` (String) Template description.
